name.description: A unique name for the recipe.

displayName.description: A display name for the recipe.

website.description: The website URL associated with the recipe.

isSetupRecipe.description: Whether this recipe is a setup recipe.

exportUtc.description: The UTC date/time when the recipe was exported.

requireNewScope.description: Whether the recipe requires a new scope.

ContentItemId.description: The unique identifier for the content item.

ContentItemVersionId.description: The version identifier for the content item.

DisplayText.description: The display text for the content item.

Latest.description: Whether this is the latest version.

Published.description: Whether this content item is published.

ModifiedUtc.description: The UTC date/time when the content item was last modified.

PublishedUtc.description: The UTC date/time when the content item was published.

CreatedUtc.description: The UTC date/time when the content item was created.

Owner.description: The owner of the content item.

Author.description: The author of the content item.

MenuItems.description: The list of menu item content items.

AdminTemplates.description: A dictionary keyed by template name. Each value has a Content property with Liquid markup.

Name.description: Deployment name as specified by the vendor.

ConnectionName.description: Connection name used to configure the provider.

Type.description: The deployment type. Defaults to Chat when not specified.

IsDefault.description: Whether this deployment is the default for its type and connection.

Deployments.description: The AI deployments to create or update.

ItemId.description: Optional unique identifier. If provided, used to find existing profile to update.

Source.description: The AI provider source name (e.g., OpenAI, Azure, Ollama). Required for new profiles.

Name.description: Unique technical name for the profile.

TitleType.description: How the session title is generated.

ChatDeploymentId.description: Chat deployment ID for the AI model.

UtilityDeploymentId.description: Utility deployment ID for the AI model.

Profiles.description: The AI profiles to create or update.

Name.description: Unique technical name for the template.

IsListable.description: Whether the template appears in the selection dropdown.

PastMessagesCount.description: Number of history messages to include.

ProfileDescription.description: Description of the profile's capabilities (used for Agent type).

Templates.description: The AI profile templates to create or update.

Connections.description: The AI provider connections to create or update.

ContentItemId.description: The unique identifier for the content item.

ContentItemVersionId.description: The version identifier for the content item.

DisplayText.description: The display text for the content item.

Latest.description: Whether this is the latest version.

Published.description: Whether this content item is published.

ModifiedUtc.description: The UTC date/time when the content item was last modified.

PublishedUtc.description: The UTC date/time when the content item was published.

CreatedUtc.description: The UTC date/time when the content item was created.

Owner.description: The owner of the content item.

Author.description: The author of the content item.

ContentTypes.description: List of content types. Fields must be attached through a content part whose PartName matches the content type's Name. Those parts must also appear in the ContentPartFieldDefinitionRecords inside ContentParts. Fields cannot be used directly in PartName.

Pattern.description: Pattern for generating the alias. Must be valid Liquid syntax.

Options.description: Whether the alias is editable or auto-generated.

Pattern.description: The pattern used to build the Path. Must be valid Liquid syntax.

SanitizeHtml.description: Sanitize HTML input. Liquid is disabled when true.

Pattern.description: Pattern for building the preview path or display content.
This string must be a valid Liquid syntax

oneOf.description: Each additional property is a custom settings content type name with its content item data.
Each additional property can use any collection name and must contain an array of user custom settings entries.

IncludeAll.description: When true, all deployments will be removed.

DeploymentNames.description: Specific deployment names to delete. Ignored when IncludeAll is true.

Rule.description: A JavaScript rule expression, e.g. isHomepage().

Path.description: Alias for TargetPath. Path where the content will be written.

SourcePath.description: Relative path from the recipe file to the source media.

SourceUrl.description: Absolute URL to download the media from.

MediaProfiles.description: A dictionary keyed by profile name. Each value is a media profile object.

Placements.description: A dictionary keyed by shape type. Each value is an array of placement objects with 'place' and optional filters.

ContentTypes.description: List of content types. Fields must be attached through a content part whose PartName matches the content type's Name. Those parts must also appear in the ContentPartFieldDefinitionRecords inside ContentParts. Fields cannot be used directly in PartName.

Pattern.description: Pattern for generating the alias. Must be valid Liquid syntax.

Options.description: Whether the alias is editable or auto-generated.

Pattern.description: The pattern used to build the Path. Must be valid Liquid syntax.

SanitizeHtml.description: Sanitize HTML input. Liquid is disabled when true.

Pattern.description: Pattern for building the preview path or display content.
This string must be a valid Liquid syntax

PermissionBehavior.description: How permissions are merged: Add (default), Replace, or Remove.

ShortcodeTemplates.description: A dictionary keyed by shortcode name.

Templates.description: A dictionary keyed by template name. Each value has a Content property with Liquid markup.

site.description: The theme ID to use for the front-end site.

admin.description: The theme ID to use for the admin dashboard.

X.description: Horizontal pixel position of the activity node in the designer.

Y.description: Vertical pixel position of the activity node in the designer.
